footer.tagline: Centralize your workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and ship faster with {appName}.

notFound.title: Page not found - 404
notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

forbidden.heading: Access forbidden
forbidden.description: You do not have the required permissions to access this resource.

unauthorized.description: You must be signed in to access this page.

tooManyRequests.description: You have made too many requests in a short period. Please wait a moment before trying again.

maintenance.description: We are currently performing maintenance to improve your experience. Please check back shortly.

home.title: Hello World
home.seoDescription: Discover the innovative solutions from {appName} to transform your business.

pricing.heading: Clear pricing, built to grow with you
pricing.subheading: Whether you're a freelancer, a small team, or a larger organization, {appName} offers flexible, no-commitment plans so you can move at your own pace.
pricing.footerNote: Displayed prices are indicative and may change. For specific needs or large volumes, contact us.
pricing.verifyEmailToast: You must verify your email address before subscribing
pricing.onlyCustomerToast: Only users with the CUSTOMER role can subscribe to a plan

starter.name: Starter

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For freelancers and small teams using {appName} every day.

business.name: Business
business.description: For advanced teams and specific needs.

seo.description: Discover {appName} pricing: flexible plans for freelancers, teams, and businesses, with no commitment.

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.subheading: A question, a project, or a specific need? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

seo.description: Contact the {appName} team. A question, a project, or a specific need? We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

privacyPolicy.seoDescription: Privacy policy for {appName}. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

signUp.seoDescription: Create your {appName} account for free. Access every feature in seconds.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email address, you will receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.successHint: Remember to check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.seoDescription: Reset your {appName} password. Receive a reset link by email.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.seoDescription: Create a new password for your {appName} account.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters

message.tooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters

banner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. Essential cookies are always enabled. You can accept all cookies, reject them, or manage your preferences.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.description: Enable or disable each cookie category. Essential cookies cannot be disabled.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: These cookies are essential for the site to function properly. They cannot be disabled.

functional.label: Functional
functional.description: These cookies remember your preferences, such as your theme or language.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how you use our site so we can improve it.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies are used to show you personalized content and relevant ads.
